title: rubus zschackei
intro: Rubus zschackei is a species of black raspberry native to the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus zschackei include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Rubus zschackei is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
